title: malcolmia contortuplicata
intro: Malcolmia contortuplicata, also known as twisted candytuft, is a flowering plant species in the Brassicaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Malcolmia contortuplicata include its potential to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Malcolmia contortuplicata typically involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
